title: mariscus brevibracteatus
intro: Mariscus brevibracteatus, also known as the Narrow Bract Sedge, is a type of plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Mariscus brevibracteatus include the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
